posts.author: mwilliams (Michael Williams )
posts.cookedHtml:
Is it possible to map one answer to multiple columns on the same board?

We currently have a form with a field to set a deadline date, which goes to the corresponding column. if left empty an automation is in place to create one.

However we now want that deadline date to be mapped to another column at the same time, so it goes to both the deadline date column and new date column.

Any help is much appreciate
